prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约30124→26662→23174→22520→24566，整体呈先升后降趋势：2021–2024年持续前移（位次数字减小），2025年出现明显后移（位次数字增大），较2024年后移约2046名，2025年基准约24566名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年347人、2022年361人、2023年413人、2024年436人、2025年398人；2026年计划388人，较2025年减少10人（缩招约2.5%），缩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第68位持续上升至2026年第61位，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理等后勤问题，对报考意愿影响有限；抖音热度排名第38位（较热），综合热度约120万，短视频平台关注度处于中上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，教育学与心理学为国家级一流学科，与该校师范特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，西南大学物理类招生专业中工科类占比较高，有利于吸引考生；本省2026年普通高考总人数约37.79万，较2025年（历史类+物理类约28.57万）大幅增加约32%，物理类考生估算约22.92万，竞争显著加剧；西南大学位于重庆，与云南地理相邻、交通便利，对云南考生有天然的地域偏好优势；该校在云南招生规模较大（物理类近400人），为云南考生提供了较多录取机会。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、学校排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、本省考生大幅增加（加剧竞争）等多重因素，考虑考生规模激增带来的竞争压力，适度上调位次；预测最低位次约24396名，区间23896–24896名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 30124 → 26662 → 23174 → 22520 → 24566, showing an overall trend of first rising then falling: from 2021 to 2024, rankings moved forward (decreasing numbers), while in 2025, there was a significant backward shift (increasing numbers), moving back about 2046 places compared to 2024, with a baseline of about 24566 in 2025; the provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plans were 347 in 2021, 361 in 2022, 413 in 2023, 436 in 2024, and 398 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 388, a decrease of 10 from 2025 (a reduction of about 2.5%), which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving logistics issues like food delivery management, which has limited impact on application willingness; Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity around 1.2 million, indicating mid-to-high attention on short video platforms; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Psychology rated A, Education rated A, Marxist Theory rated A-, with Education and Psychology being national first-class disciplines, closely aligned with the university's teacher-training characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and Southwest University's Physics Category enrollment majors have a relatively high proportion of engineering fields, which helps attract students; the province's total number of general college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 285,700), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 229,200, intensifying competition; Southwest University is located in Chongqing, geographically adjacent to Yunnan with convenient transportation, offering a natural regional preference advantage for Yunnan candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Yunnan (nearly 400 in Physics Category), providing many admission opportunities for Yunnan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plans (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in university rankings (enhancing attractiveness), and the significant increase in provincial candidates (intensifying competition), and taking into account the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, the ranking is moderately adjusted upward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 24396, with a range of 23896–24896.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23896–24896, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23800), you can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 24800), you should use Tier 3 majors at the Rongchang Campus as safety options to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 5837→4331→3784→3396→3425, showing an overall continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative forward movement was about 2441 places. In 2025, compared to 2024, there was a slight backward movement of 29 places, essentially flat. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3425 places. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 60 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 50 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 41, a decrease of 9 from 2025 (a reduction of about 18%), which is a significant reduction and has a notable alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, reflecting the university's increasing comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving logistics management issues, which has limited impact on application willingness. Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.2 million, indicating mid-to-upper level attention on short video platforms. No obvious records of enrollment gaps. Psychology is rated A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-. Education and Psychology are national first-class disciplines, highly matching the university's liberal arts enrollment majors (such as Education, Applied Psychology), providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, while liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have recommended social popularity. Overall, the popularity of liberal arts majors is stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025. The estimated number of history category examinees is about 148,700, leading to significantly intensified competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, geographically adjacent to Yunnan with convenient transportation, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for Yunnan candidates. The university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Yunnan is moderate (about 40–60 people), providing stable admission opportunities for Yunnan liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the essentially flat ranking in 2025, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in university ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the substantial increase in provincial examinees (intensifying competition), and taking into account the competitive pressure from the surge in examinee numbers, the ranking is moderately adjusted upward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3105, with a range of 2605–3605.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2605–3605, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2600), focus on reaching for Tier 1 advantageous majors such as Ideological and Political Education, Law, and Education. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 3500), use Rongchang Campus majors as safety to ensure admission.
